title: Fixed and Mixed
description: Have ever you wondered how Minecraft could be if some of features were mixed but also revamped?
body:
![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/732c708d519fdfeeccc258c4241886b1dd62faa7.png)



<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/6EsFOQ2WrAg" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>



## Welcome to the Fixed and Mixed Modpack!

This modpack aim to fix and revamp (and add) all the features of Minecraft, but still maintaining the vanilla-like!

For example, the combat system is revamped to be like the 1.16 experimental snapshots!

Or, welp, Java and Bedrock are now equal!
Or... there's the old fog... which brings the old atmosphere...

Speaking of atmosphere, you can play the older models of the world! (like Beta 1.7.3, or Indev...)

Aaaaand, you can toggle the _"Nostalgia Features"_ with the NostalgicTweaks mod!

Also, there are more mobs, more biomes, more items!

![Geez that's the old spider model](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/101729489fca2308d6181fc059867c7b099f7cf7.png)

Basically:
- Combat System revamped to be similiar to the 1.16 experimental snapshots (the one who was discontinued, which is basically CTS)
- You can bring back the old nostalgia feelings!
- You can play the older models of the old Minecraft
- You can play with a controller (or even a mobile touchscreen)
- Music never ends
- Old legacy console sounds :')
- Java and Bedrock are now equal with almost no differences
- The wild update got more wilder
- Fireflies :D
- Birch Forests are updated!
- The Warden is now more OP
- Cooler animations
- Mob variations
- Faster Minecarts (actually, it completely revamps all the minecart engine)
- Rejected mobs are now added! (welp, not all of them, but most of them)
- A dummy, which is just a dummy
- Optimization for potato PCs
- And many more things...



![The UI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42b899480f1a68cda07decb6e48cdd1597a3889c.png)



Credits to all the modders and resource pack-ers!
